memberdef.type: std::function< Result< std::unique_ptr< AuthManager > >(std::string_view name, const std::unordered_map< std::string, std::string > &properties)>
memberdef.definition: using iceberg::rest::auth::AuthManagerFactory = typedef std::function<Result<std::unique_ptr<AuthManager> >( std::string_view name, const std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string>& properties)>
memberdef.name: AuthManagerFactory

briefdescription.para: Function that creates an AuthManager from its name.

parameterdescription.para: Properties required by the auth manager.

simplesect.para: Newly created manager instance or an error if creation fails.

briefdescription.para: Create a no-op authentication manager (no authentication).
Create a SigV4 authentication manager with a delegate. Returns NotSupported when the library was built without ICEBERG_SIGV4.
Build auth headers from a token string.

simplesect.para: Headers map with Authorization header if token is non-empty.

briefdescription.para: Fetch an OAuth2 token using the client_credentials grant type.

parameterdescription.para: HTTP client to use for the request.
Auth session for the request headers.
Auth configuration containing credential, scope, token endpoint, and optional OAuth params.

simplesect.para: The token response or an error.

briefdescription.para: Extract expiration time from a JWT token.

detaileddescription.para: Decodes the JWT payload (base64url) and reads the "exp" claim. Returns std::nullopt if the token is not a valid JWT or has no "exp" claim.

parameterdescription.para: A token string. If it is a JWT (three dot-separated base64url segments), the "exp" claim is extracted from the payload.

simplesect.para: Expiration time as milliseconds since epoch, or std::nullopt.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the AWS SDK for SigV4 use. Idempotent.

detaileddescription.para: Normal REST SigV4 users do not need to call this. SigV4 sessions lazily initialize the SDK when needed. This hook exists for tests and for explicit process-shutdown sequencing when an embedding application needs it.

briefdescription.para: Shut down the SigV4-owned AWS SDK lifecycle.

detaileddescription.para: Refuses if any SigV4 sessions are alive.
